elements.content:
SCANDI MEDICAL CLINIC BORACAY
Scandi Medical Clinic
Bolabog, Malay, 5608 Aklan

ACTIVITY: For at least the next 2 weeks:
• Avoid strenuous activities
• No heavy lifting
• No prolonged standing or walking
• No sports or intense physical exertion
• Get adequate rest

MEDICATIONS: Continue prescribed medications as directed:
• Loperamide – 50 mg every 4–6 hours as needed
• Bismuth Subsalicylate – 10 mg once daily

TREATMENTS:
• Eating a heart-healthy diet with less salt
• Getting regular physical activity
• Maintaining a healthy weight or losing weight
• Limiting alcohol
• Not smoking
• Getting 7 to 9 hours of sleep daily

CALL YOUR DOCTOR IF YOU HAVE:
Headache,
Flushed, dry skin.
Irritability and confusion.
Severe nausea and vomiting.
Light-headedness and dizziness.
Fatigue (tiredness that doesn't improve with rest).
Dark pee, small amounts of pee or no peeing at all

Severe nausea and vomiting.
Light-headedness and dizziness.
Fatigue (tiredness that doesn't improve with rest).
Dark pee, small amounts of pee or no peeing at all

options.text: OTHER: 12 glasses of water per day, high-protein diet, soft food

elements.content:
FOLLOW UP / REFERRALS:
Home Care: Ensure adequate hydration, and monitoring of vital signs
Return to MD:
Other: Write down any new symptoms or concerns for the next visit

EQUIPMENT:
• Thermometer: To monitor fever
• BP Monitor / Pulse Oximeter (if available): To check heart rate
I HAVE RECEIVED THE ABOVE INSTRUCTIONS AND WAS GIVEN THE OPPORTUNITY TO ASK QUESTIONS.
